Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: A broken gaming console and a stolen laptop have exes Dominique and Deon standing before the judges.
Video.title: Childress vs. Alston

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: Friends-turned-lovers Kemuel and Bridget struggle to take their relationship to the next level due to a lack of trust.
Video.title: Crossty vs. Lovelace

Video.summary: Yashira seeks to prove that Gregory is the father of her 4-year-old after years of doubt and speculation.
Video.title: Guadalupe vs. Phillips

Video.summary: Teresa issues ex-boyfriend Keita an ultimatum: agree to consistent co-parenting or start paying child support.
Video.title: Jefferson vs. Singleton

Video.summary: Angel sues his proclaimed "frienemy with benefits," Celesta, for six months' unpaid rent.
Video.title: Clark vs. Williams

Video.summary: Keith wants his girlfriend, Jacey, to take a polygraph test because he suspects she cheated with an older customer at her job.
Video.title: Fitchpatrick vs. Gray

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: Sade confronts her boyfriend, Jeremy, in court about his gambling addiction and bill money spent on lottery tickets.
Video.title: Black vs. Wiles

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: A sports betting addiction brings Erica and her boyfriend to court.
Video.title: East vs. Conner

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: Professional R&B artist Nathaniel disputes his girlfriend LeAnn's accusation of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Hall vs. Peterson

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: Symoan and Hillary seek answers from the Cutlers' compatibility test in an effort to save their 10-year marriage.
Video.title: Willis vs. Greene

Video.summary: The results of a polygraph test will reveal if webcam star and sugar baby Andrea has been cheating on her boyfriend, Justin.
Video.title: Stephens vs. Harris

Video.summary: Charles Louis sues Carnel Scott for $1,359, claiming he was evicted from an illegal rooming house with 13 residents, including criminals and drug users. Carnel defends his legal operation, accusing Charles of being disruptive and violent.
Video.title: Sketchy Rental Situation

Video.summary: Anthony Franco sues Anabel Orellana De Ramirez for $334.50, claiming she agreed to pay for extra luggage charges he covered to bring items for her family. Anabel denies owing him, saying the suit is revenge for rejecting his romantic advances.
Video.title: Suspicious Texts

Video.summary: Barbara claims Sandra reneged on a deal to exchange a show dog for a female puppy from a litter, suing for $3,000. Sandra argues no puppy was promised, as her dog wasn’t in heat.
Video.title: Doggie Paternity Disaster

Video.summary: Anissa Williams sues her dad, Nathaniel Green, for $5,000, claiming he owes her money despite the heartbreak. Nathaniel argues the money was family kindness and countersues for $1,000 for slander.
Video.title: Abandoned by Her Father

Video.summary: Plaintiff Davey James sues lawyer Benjamin Yu for $5,000, claiming Yu failed to represent him in a DUI case after being arrested himself. Yu countersues for $2,500, citing unpaid fees for services rendered.
Video.title: Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official

Image.alt: Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official
Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official
Lawyer Arrested for Bribing a Court Official

Video.summary: Ehab sues for $5,000, claiming Melissa and Forest rear-ended his car, causing injuries and damage. The defendants counter, alleging Ehab braked suddenly, causing the crash. They deny wrongdoing and file a $2,300 counterclaim for bumper repairs.
Video.title: Rear-End Ruckus

Video.summary: A man says his ex vandalized his van, and while they were dating, she punched him in the face and ended up in jail.
Video.title: Trading Punches

Video.summary: Andrea wants $3000 from her ex-boyfriend after stealing from her during her active addiction.
Video.title: Taking Advantage

Video.summary: Brian is being sued by his wife Doretha for an illegal eviction after she left when he brought another woman home.
Video.title: Three's a Crowd

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after her 9-year-old son passed away, she became addicted to heroin but has been clean for 30 years; she is suing her former friend for repayment of a loan, while the ex-friend denies owing her for anything.
Video.title: Past Bonds and Present Debts

Video.summary: Delores says her twin sister agreed to split her medical bills when she became ill while planning her party.
Video.title: Bachelorette Party Gone Bad

Video.summary: Chanel is suing her ex for a gift and emotional distress after finding out he's been texting other women.
Video.title: What Happened in Vegas?

Video.summary: Christopher is sued by his mother for parking tickets after being unable to forgive her for choosing drugs.
Video.title: Parking Tickets and Past Troubles

Video.summary: The plaintiff wants her friend to repay her for a loan; the defendant says she used the money for her daughter's prom, but the plaintiff and her friends broke out into a fight and destroyed the venue, so she has refused to repay her.
Video.title: Prom Night

Video.summary: Aisha claims Antwan harassed her and posted an explicit photo of her on social media without her permission.
Video.title: A Scantily Clad Suit

Video.summary: Maddy sues Vanessa for theft and emotional distress, seeking $300,000. Their IVF journey soured due to suspicions of cheating and missing money. Vanessa claims shared IVF funds; Maddy discovered an affair with Tyler, a mutual friend.
Video.title: Conception, Deception

Video.summary: Chris sues ex-wife Lisa for $10K, citing emotional distress and property damage. He says Lisa punctured his emotional support doll, "Dolly." Lisa denies it, blaming Chris's objectophilia and claiming Dolly deflated when he sat on it.
Video.title: Deflated Love

Video.summary: Daniel sues Jeremy for $800,000, alleging copyright infringement over "Nightshade Ninja" costume copied as "Shadow Shogun." Jeremy denies, claims originality, forgives Daniel for reputation damage.
Video.title: The Hero-Con

Video.summary: The Wilsons sue Sean Moore, Ballpark Bandits sponsor, for $10,000. Their son got fired mid-season, Sean blames Kevin's erratic behavior and Laurie for fostering negativity and intimidating parents.
Video.title: Little League, Big Problems

Video.summary: Michael Brown sues Victor Hernandez, "Savage Skin" tattoo shop owner, for $50,000, alleging Victor maliciously altered his tattoo design due to a grudge over dating Victor's ex, causing an embarrassing tattoo. Victor says it's a misunderstanding.
Video.title: Ink Is Best Served Cold

Video.summary: Annie sues ex-best friend Olivia for $150K emotional distress. Olivia, once maid of honor, hijacked wedding plans, changing venue and dresses. Annie feels betrayed, removed Olivia from bridal party. Olivia defends, says she improved wedding.
Video.title: Nuptial Nemesis

Video.summary: Guillermo Logan sues Nancy Grant for $5M, alleging false imprisonment and mental anguish after getting trapped by her security system during a burglary. Nancy defends her system due to past burglaries and questions Guillermo's criminal history.
Video.title: Caught in the Act

Video.summary: Evelyn sues Dexter for $500K, saying he tricked her into leaving her marriage, causing financial ruin and distress. Dexter denies, saying she pursued him as a gold digger.
Video.title: For Love or Money

Video.summary: Samantha sues Elizabeth and PI Ricardo for $40,000 over false accusations. Elizabeth hired Ricardo to investigate Samantha's husband but wrongly accused Samantha. Samantha claims harassment, and defamation. Elizabeth and Ricardo deny responsibility.
Video.title: Shadows of Doubt
